headline: Cat Learns To Open Doors, Now Demands Privacy And A 'Do Not Disturb' Sign
summary: 'He closes the door behind him,' his owner said. 'He's very private.' The sign was written in paw.
fullBody: Mr. Whiskers learned to open doors. He now closes them behind him. 'He demands privacy,' his owner, Mark, said. 'He has a 'do not disturb' sign now.' The sign was written in paw prints. 'He's very serious,' Mark said. Mr. Whiskers has started a 'privacy podcast.' Episode 1: 'The Importance of Closed Doors.' He has 47,000 followers. 'He's very influential,' Mark said.
